debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
f : U → ℕ
h : empty A
⊢ image f A = I 0

proof:
by
  ext n; constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, hx, _⟩; exact (h ⟨x, hx⟩).elim
  · intro h1; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim
failed_attempts:
by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    obtain x hx from h1
    define at h
    contradiction
  · intro h1
    define at h1
    contradiction

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    rcases h1 with ⟨x, hx, _⟩
    exfalso; exact h ⟨x, hx⟩
  · intro h1
    exfalso; exact Nat.not_lt_zero n h1

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; constructor
  · intro ⟨x, hx, _⟩; exact absurd ⟨x, hx⟩ h
  · intro hn; exact absurd hn (Nat.not_lt_zero n)

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · intro h1
    obtain ⟨x, hx, _⟩ := h1
    exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro h1
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro n
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    obtain ⟨x, hx, _⟩ := h1
    exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro hn
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n hn).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · intro h1
    obtain u hu from h1
    exact absurd ⟨u, hu.left⟩ h
  · intro hn
    exact absurd hn (Nat.not_lt_zero n)

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; constructor
  · intro h1; rcases h1 with ⟨x, hA, _⟩; exact (h ⟨x, hA⟩).elim
  · intro h1; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · intro h1
    obtain ⟨x, hxA, _⟩ := h1
    exact False.elim (h ⟨x, hxA⟩)
  · intro h1
    exact False.elim (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1)

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    obtain ⟨x, hx, _⟩ := h1
    exact (h ⟨x, hx⟩).elim
  · intro h2
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h2).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x, hx, _⟩
    exact (h ⟨x, hx⟩).elim
  · intro hn
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n hn).elim

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; constructor
  · intro h1
    obtain ⟨x, hx, _⟩ := h1
    exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro h1
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · intro h1
    rcases h1 with ⟨x, hxA, _⟩
    exact (h x hxA).elim
  · intro h1
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · intro h1
    obtain ⟨x, hx, hfx⟩ := h1
    exact (h ⟨x, hx⟩).elim
  · intro h1
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply set_extensionality; intro n; apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1; obtain x h2 from h1; exact (h x h2.left).elim
  · intro h1; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply Set.ext; intro n; apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1; obtain x hx from h1; define at h; apply h x at hx.left; contradiction
  · intro h2; define at h2; contradiction

by
  apply Set.ext
  intro n
  apply Iff.intro
  · rintro ⟨x, hx, _⟩
    exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro hn
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n hn).elim

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; constructor
  · intro h1; define at h1; obtain x hx from h1
    define at h; have h2 := h x; contradiction
  · intro h1; define at h1; contradiction

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    rcases h1 with ⟨x, hxA, _⟩
    exact (h ⟨x, hxA⟩).elim
  · intro h1
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; constructor
  · intro ⟨x, hx, _⟩; exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro hn; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n hn).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, hx, _⟩
    exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro hn
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n hn).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    obtain x hx from h1
    have : ∃ x, x ∈ A := ⟨x, hx.left⟩
    contradiction
  · intro h1
    define at h1
    contradiction

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; apply Iff.intro
  · rintro ⟨x, hx, _⟩; exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro h1; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

by
  apply set_ext
  intro n
  constructor
  · intro h1
    rcases h1 with ⟨x, hx, _⟩
    exact (h x hx).elim
  · intro hn
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n hn).elim

by
  apply set_ext; intro n; constructor
  · intro h1; obtain ⟨x, hx, _⟩ := h1; exact absurd ⟨x, hx⟩ h
  · intro h1; exact absurd h1 (Nat.not_lt_zero n)
successful_attempts:
by
  ext n; constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, hx, _⟩; exact (h ⟨x, hx⟩).elim

  · intro ⟨x, hx, _⟩; exact (h ⟨x, hx⟩).elim
  · intro hn; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n hn).elim

  · intro h1; obtain ⟨x, hxA, _⟩ := h1; exact (h ⟨x, hxA⟩).elim
  · intro h1; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero n h1).elim

  ext n
  constructor
  · intro ⟨x, hx, _⟩

  · intro h1

  apply Set.ext; intro n; constructor
  · intro h1; rcases h1 with ⟨x, hx, _⟩; exact (h ⟨x, hx⟩).elim
